equipBonuses.name: Overwhelming Support
equipBonuses.description: When in combat with only one enemy, gain 11,325 Outgoing Healing. This bonus is divided by the total number of enemies you are in combat with.

equipBonuses.name: Assassin's Bloodbath
equipBonuses.description: Whenever you critically strike an enemy with your Powers, you gain 12,450 Critical Severity for 10 seconds. (15 second cooldown)

equipBonuses.name: The Ol' Switcheroo
equipBonuses.description: +11,325 Power, +3,775 Defense.

equipBonuses.name: Survivor's Reflexes
equipBonuses.description: Gain up to 12,450 Awareness based on your missing health. The max bonus is achieved at 25% or less health.

equipBonuses.name: Precision Tactics
equipBonuses.description: When your Stamina is over 75%, your Critical Avoidance is increased by 7,275.

equipBonuses.name: Challenger's Forte
equipBonuses.description: When in combat with 3 or more enemies, your Forte is increased by 1,455 every 2 seconds. Every 2 seconds you are in combat with 1 or less enemies, lose 1 stack. Max Stacks: 5 — 7,275 Forte.
